name: United Power Technology AG
summary: United Power Technology AG, together with its subsidiaries, designs, develops, manufactures, and sells engine-driven power equipment. The company offers residential and commercial gasoline, inverter, and diesel generators; industrial equipment, such as gasoline and diesel water pumps; and landscaping machinery, including gasoline and diesel pressure washers. It also provides components consisting of gasoline, diesel, and V-twin gasoline engines; parts comprising motor standers, rotators, pistons, fuel tanks, crankcases and crankcase covers, silicon-steel sheets, panels, mufflers, fuel tanks, crank shafts, cylinder heads, and enamel wires; and other products. The company serves gardening/DIY, camping, power outage/waterflow, construction/professional, and outdoor markets. It sells its products through original equipment manufacturers, wholesalers, and retailers. The company has operations in the People's Republic of China, North America, Europe, Africa, the Middle East, and internationally. United Power Technology AG was founded in 2010 and is based in Eschborn, Germany.
